lineage.Process: AddField All_lines Line_Id TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rd_Leng_km DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rd_Name TEXT # # 30 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rd_Con_Mat TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rd_CW_Wid DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rd_ROW_Wid DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rd_Maintai TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines FP TEXT # # 3 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines FP_Width DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines FP_Con_Mat TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rail_Id TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Rly_Name TEXT # # 30 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Br_Fly_Id TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Br_Fl_Wid DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Br_Fl_Len DOUBLE # # # # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Br_Fl_Cons TEXT # # 15 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Br_Fl_Yr TEXT # # 4 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Ward_No TEXT # # 10 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #
AddField All_lines Locality TEXT # # 50 # NULLABLE NON_REQUIRED #

CalculateField All_lines Line_Id GetDuplicateCounter( !OBJECTID! ) PYTHON_9.3 "import numpy as np
prevFieldValue = ''
counter = 0
def GetDuplicateCounter(myFieldValue): 
 global prevFieldValue
 global counter
 if myFieldValue == prevFieldValue:
 counter = 1
 else:
 counter += 1
 prevFieldValue = myFieldValue
 return "RD_"+str(counter)"

CalculateField All_lines Line_Id GetDuplicateCounter( !OBJECTID! ) PYTHON_9.3 "import numpy as np
prevFieldValue = ''
counter = 0
def GetDuplicateCounter(myFieldValue): 
 global prevFieldValue
 global counter
 if myFieldValue == prevFieldValue:
 counter = 1
 else:
 counter += 1
 prevFieldValue = myFieldValue
 return "RL_"+str(counter)"

CalculateField All_lines Line_Id GetDuplicateCounter( !OBJECTID! ) PYTHON_9.3 "import numpy as np
prevFieldValue = ''
counter = 0
def GetDuplicateCounter(myFieldValue): 
 global prevFieldValue
 global counter
 if myFieldValue == prevFieldValue:
 counter = 1
 else:
 counter += 1
 prevFieldValue = myFieldValue
 return "BR_"+str(counter)"

CalculateField All_lines Line_Id GetDuplicateCounter( !OBJECTID! ) PYTHON_9.3 "import numpy as np
prevFieldValue = ''
counter = 0
def GetDuplicateCounter(myFieldValue): 
 global prevFieldValue
 global counter
 if myFieldValue == prevFieldValue:
 counter = 1
 else:
 counter += 1
 prevFieldValue = myFieldValue
 return "FL_"+str(counter)"

CalculateField All_lines Line_Id GetDuplicateCounter( !OBJECTID! ) PYTHON_9.3 "import numpy as np
prevFieldValue = ''
counter = 0
def GetDuplicateCounter(myFieldValue): 
 global prevFieldValue
 global counter
 if myFieldValue == prevFieldValue:
 counter = 1
 else:
 counter += 1
 prevFieldValue = myFieldValue
 return "WB_"+str(counter)"

Merge ROAD_667;ROAD_666;merge_ALL_ROADS "D:\amrut\for deepa\road_merge.gdb\merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL" "Class "Class" true true false 4 Long 0 0 ,First,#,ROAD_667,Class,-1,-1,ROAD_666,Class,-1,-1,merge_ALL_ROADS,Class,-1,-1;Sub_Class "Sub_Class" true true false 50 Text 0 0 ,First,#,ROAD_667,Sub_Class,-1,-1,ROAD_666,Sub_Class,-1,-1,merge_ALL_ROADS,Sub_Class,-1,-1;Code "Code" true true false 10 Text 0 0 ,First,#,ROAD_667,Code,-1,-1,ROAD_666,Code,-1,-1,merge_ALL_ROADS,Code,-1,-1;Line_Id "Line_Id" true true false 15 Text 0 0 ,First,#,ROAD_667,Line_Id,-1,-1,ROAD_666,Line_Id,-1,-1,merge_ALL_ROADS,Line_Id,-1,-1;Rd_Leng_km "Rd_Leng_km" true true false 8 Double 0 0 CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL LINE_ID_n [Line_Id] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Br_Fl_Len [Shape_Length] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Br_Fl_Len [Shape_Length] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Br_Fl_Len [Shape_Length] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Br_Fl_Len [Shape_Length] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Rd_Leng_km [Shape_Length] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Drainage_Covered_Uncovered [Drainage_Covered_Uncovered_n] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL DRAINAGE_WDTH [DRAINAGE_WDTH_n] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Drainage_YN [Drainage_YN_n] VB #
CalculateField merge_ALL_ROADS_FINAL Line_Id [LINE_ID_n] VB #

FeatureClassToFeatureClass ROADS "G:\amrut23-03-2020\AMRUT FINAL DATA FOR SUBMIT SHAPEFILE\scan map\final merged landuse\final merged landuse\ready to print wtht subclass\New File Geodatabase.gdb" ROAD_UPDATED # Buffer EX.ROAD_LINE_NAME_NADAKKAVU "E:\Arcgis pro\3dbuilding\bufferroad2.shp" "1 Meters" FULL ROUND NONE # PLANAR

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
